Class Rule

java.lang.Object
at.jku.se.smarthome.model.Rule
public class Rule extends Object
Represents a Rule in the SmartHome system.

  • Constructor Details

    • Rule

      public Rule(String ruleId, String name, String triggerType, String sourceDevice, String condition, String action, String targetDevice, boolean enabled, String status)
      Creates an automation rule.
      Parameters:
      ruleId - unique rule identifier
      name - display name of the rule
      triggerType - trigger category
      sourceDevice - trigger source device or source label
      condition - trigger condition expression
      action - action to perform
      targetDevice - target device name
      enabled - whether the rule is enabled
      status - current status label
